name: mazeledger-bots
description: Build spot & futures trading bots on ZebPay via the MazeLedger API. Bundles a skill + hosted MCP server so you can onboard, register end-users (BYO keys), and place & manage orders in natural language.

api_key.title: MazeLedger API Key
api_key.description: Your MazeLedger org API key — ml_test_… (sandbox, simulated, free) or ml_live_… (real orders). Get one from https://mazeledger.ai/docs.

base_url.title: API Base URL
base_url.description: MazeLedger API base URL. Leave default unless self-hosting.
